falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug assumed a higher low structure; a break below 4,800 would violate the August 2024 bottom's key support level and invalidate the bullish reversal pattern being matched

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained VIX above 25 indicates panic-level volatility inconsistent with a bottoming formation; the August 2024 bottom saw VIX peak at 23.99 and rapidly decline, so this would prove the current structure is not a similar bottom but rather a breakdown into deeper risk-off

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury yield spread inverts further below -50 basis points (currently approximately -15bps)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom coincided with yield curve steepening (disinversion) as a growth signal; further inversion to -50bps would indicate accelerating recession pricing that contradicts the 'bottom' narrative and would signal the pattern match failed

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
